title: geonoma pohliana subsp. unaensis
intro: Geonoma pohliana subsp. unaensis is a subspecies of palm tree, specifically a type of climbing palm native to the tropical regions of the Americas. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory and gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, Geonoma pohliana subsp. unaensis is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
